description: CompositionDark grey and black full length cargo pants made of 100% cotton, has flat front with two pockets on the sides, two buttoned pockets on the knee area, two welt pockets on the back, embroidered brand logo on right back pocket, metal zipper and button closure, and reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area and the hemlineFittingSlimWash careMachine wash coldWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironA famous saying goes - "A man's class is raised by a bar with the trousers he wears". The man of substance always chooses his trousers with much care, and scullers makes it all the more easier with its classsy range of formal trousers. Designed with the choicest of selected fabrics, it makes for a perfect daily office wear. Pair it with classic shirts and leather shoes to look every bit like the corporate that you are.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 41.5"Height-6.1", waist-31"
